name: @deemwario/mochallama
description: Run a local llama.cpp LLM from the terminal — JVM-powered (Project Panama FFM), shipped as self-contained jlink runtime images. Cross-platform via per-platform optional dependencies.
author: deemwar <io@deemwar.com>
//platform-note: This package carries NO native payload. The jlink runtime image (trimmed JRE + llama.cpp natives) lives in the per-platform optionalDependencies below — npm installs only the one matching the host os/cpu; bin/mochallama.js resolves it at runtime. Keep these versions pinned in lockstep with this package's version.
